title: Atan Method, Spel Class
syntax: Function Atan(number As Double) As Double
parameters: number	Numeric expression representing the tangent of an angular value.
description: Returns the arc tangent of a numeric expression.
see_also:
Atan2

Atan Example

VB Example:

Dim angle As Double

angle = m_spel.Atan(.7)

C# Example:

double angle;

angle = m_spel.Atan(.7);
examples:
Dim angle As Double

angle = m_spel.Atan(.7)
